description: domain_of strips the scheme and takes up to the first /; is_fake_link compares the whole domain to real; is_phishing returns True on a fake link OR >= 2 alarm words.
Flags the fake-link case AND the real-link-but-scary-message case, while leaving a calm legit email safe; counts alarm words case-insensitively.
is_fake_link reuses domain_of and is_phishing reuses is_fake_link; clear names; a return on every path.
